task:
Deprecate all tp subcommands as described in the spec file .specs/deprecate-tp-commands.md.

## Task Summary

Deprecate tp apply, tp validate, tp destroy, and the parent tp command using Cobra's built-in Deprecated field. Each command prints a deprecation banner and stops executing (no-op RunE).

## Files to Modify

1. cli/internal/cmd/trackingplan/apply/apply.go
   - Set Deprecated: use rudder-cli apply instead. This command will be removed in a future release.
   - Remove PreRunE
   - Replace RunE body with return nil
   - Remove all unused imports and flag definitions

2. cli/internal/cmd/trackingplan/validate/validate.go
   - Set Deprecated: use rudder-cli validate instead. This command will be removed in a future release.
   - Replace RunE body with return nil
   - Remove all unused imports and flag definitions

3. cli/internal/cmd/trackingplan/destroy/destroy.go
   - Set Deprecated: use rudder-cli destroy instead. This command will be removed in a future release.
   - Replace RunE body with return nil
   - Remove all unused imports and flag definitions

4. cli/internal/cmd/trackingplan/trackingplan.go
   - Set Deprecated: all tp subcommands have been replaced by top-level commands (apply, validate, destroy). This command group will be removed in a future release.
   - Update Short to: [Deprecated] Manage datacatalog resources
   - Remove Example heredoc (references deprecated subcommands)
   - Remove heredoc import if no longer used

## Verification Steps

After making changes:
1. Run make lint - ensure no unused imports or variables
2. Run make test - ensure no test breakages
summary: Deprecated tp apply, tp validate, tp destroy, and the parent tp command using Cobra's Deprecated field, replacing each RunE with a no-op and removing all unused imports and flag definitions. Lint passes with 0 issues.
